name: indesign-mcp-server
description: A comprehensive Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Adobe InDesign automation with 50+ professional tools including document management, text/graphics creation, style management, and image scaling

scripts.build: echo 'No build step required for Node.js'
scripts.test:unit: node tests/test-template-active-guard.js && node tests/test-template-logs.js && node tests/test-template-readiness.js && node tests/test-template-unit.js && node tests/test-template-reliability.js && node tests/test-template-page-duplication.js && python3 tests/test_fill_template_from_csv.py && node tests/test-preview-image-response.js && node tests/test-asset-materialization.js && npm run test:bridge && node tests/test-uxp-busy-gate.js && node tests/test-template-inspection-bounds.js && node tests/test-template-safe-text-mutation.js && node tests/test-template-derivative-identity.js && node tests/test-template-decorative-bleed-bounds.js

author: lucdesign
